title: glochidion cornutum
intro: Glochidion cornutum, also known as the horned globeberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Glochidion cornutum include its ability to relieve coughs and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for respiratory conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, with some herbal preparations recommending a combination with other herbs for enhanced benefits.
